vllm-project / vllm

A high-throughput and memory-efficient inference engine for LLMs and multimodal models

openai / openai-python

The official Python library for the OpenAI API — includes support for GPT-4 and embeddings

torvalds / linux

Linux kernel source tree

huggingface / transformers
